enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannukul Kannai?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional journey of the characters in the movie.

Who composed the music for Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaya?

The music for Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaya was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

Who is the singer of Kannukul Kannai?

The song is beautifully sung by Naresh Iyer.

What is the release year of Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaya?

The movie was released in the year 2010.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song highlights the protagonist's deep feelings and the emotional complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaya, Kannukul Kannai is a poignant melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Naresh Iyer, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional turmoil and deep affection. AR Rahman's composition, combined with Thamarai's poetic lyrics, creates an atmosphere of romantic melancholy. The song evokes a sense of yearning and connection, making it a memorable piece in the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful melody of Kannukul Kannai from the movie Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaya. This enchanting track, brought to life by Naresh Iyer's mesmerizing voice and AR Rahman's magical composition, captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the poetic world crafted by lyricist Thamarai and let the music transport you to a realm of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: You kept your eyes on mine, saying no, no, but hid a lie inside and left with a glance. You took the knife of love and spoke to me, came close, touched, and spoke in dreams. I still came closer and gave a kiss. Even after all this, saying there is no love is true. You and I, both are children.
I am not your friend, I did not come. I am not your friend, you are not my life. I am not your friend, I did not come. I am not your friend, you are not my life.

You kept your eyes on mine, saying no, no, but hid a lie inside and left with a glance. You took the knife of love and spoke to me, came close, touched, and spoke in dreams. I still came closer and gave a kiss.

You and I are the same point, the same line. The place where you and I go to live is the same house. Love means pain. Running to me, looking into my eyes, saying it's love, and changing my pain. Running to me, looking into my eyes, saying it's love, and changing my pain.

You kept your eyes on mine, saying no, no, but hid a lie inside and left with a glance. You took the knife of love and spoke to me, came close, touched, and spoke in dreams. I still came closer and gave a kiss. Even after all this, saying there is no love is true. You and I, both are children.
I am not your friend, I did not come. I am not your friend, you are not my life. I am not your friend, I did not come. I am not your friend, you are not my life.
